overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy open-world game showing a character in a white cape walking through a grassy field toward a distant castle with a massive golden tree. The character passes two red-robed enemies and continues through the landscape with large tilted rock formations.

tall green and golden grass covering the rolling hills on both sides of the path
narrow dirt trail winding through the grass
trees with golden-yellow autumn foliage scattered on the hillside

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt path through an open grassland with a massive golden tree and stone castle visible in the far distance. The landscape features rolling hills covered in tall grass and scattered autumn trees under a clear blue sky.

events.description: character approaches two stationary red-robed enemies standing beside the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path, passing close to two enemies dressed in red robes holding large weapons

notable_agents.action: two red-robed figures with large weapons standing motionless near the path

entered.detail: massive stone spires tilted at sharp angles visible in the far distance

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking and approaches two stationary enemies in red robes standing near the path. Large tilted rock formations become visible in the far left distance while the golden tree and castle remain in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with large tilted rock spires

events.description: large tilted rock formations become prominent on the left as the golden tree exits view

agents.ego_description: walking through the open field with massive tilted rock spires rising prominently on the left side

entered.detail: ancient stone ruins and broken walls visible beyond the rock spires

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the open grassland as massive tilted rock spires dominate the left side of the frame. The golden tree has passed out of view behind the character, while the distant castle remains visible ahead and ancient ruins appear near the rock formations.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an open grassland that shifts from a vista of a golden tree to a landscape dominated by towering rock spires. It begins with a character walking along a dirt path through rolling hills and autumn trees, with a massive golden tree and stone castle visible in the far distance under a clear blue sky. As the character continues forward, the camera approaches two stationary enemies in red robes while large tilted rock formations begin to emerge in the distance to the left. The scene then expands as these massive rock spires grow to dominate the left side of the frame, with ancient ruins appearing nearby. Finally, the golden tree passes out of view behind the character, leaving only the distant castle visible ahead across the open terrain.
